requests.request: The phone I purchased from your store last month is no longer powering on.
I opened the package and found the cup I ordered to be cracked.
The phone case I received is not the color I specified in my order.
The shoes I bought seem to be a different size than what I ordered.
I can't locate my package despite the delivery confirmation.
The charger I bought last week is getting too hot during use.
The screen protector I received is not compatible with the model I selected.
My bank statement shows two charges for the same order.
The item I received appears to be used, even though I ordered a new one.
Could you explain your return and exchange policy for electronics?
